recommendations.title: Control
recommendations.overview: Lee Ray Oliver, a death row inmate, is given a second chance at life if he agrees to undergo a new chemical treatment used to modify behavior.

recommendations.title: Sarfarosh
recommendations.overview: When terrorists kill a cop's brother and disable his father, he fights back against the smuggling of guns and drugs which plagues his country.

recommendations.title: Jack Frost
recommendations.overview: On his way to be executed, the vehicle containing notorious serial killer Jack Frost collides with a hazardous chemical truck, turning him into a snow covered mutant and unleashing him on the unsuspecting town of Snomonton.

recommendations.title: Zombie Flesh Eaters 2
recommendations.overview: When a terrorist's body, infected with a stolen chemical, is recovered by the US military, the corpse is cremated, unintentionally releasing a virus and bacteria into the atmosphere over a small island.

recommendations.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Family, Comedy, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear's love of food trucks and viral videos get out of hand, the brothers are now chased away from their home and embark on a trip to Canada, where they can live in peace.

recommendations.title: Arctic Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their way across the ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.
